title: CSS for Modern Web Applications Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on modern CSS development strategies and features.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of CSS Modules?
options: It makes CSS files smaller.
It automatically scopes CSS to a component, preventing global namespace collisions.
It converts all CSS to JavaScript objects.
It only works with static HTML files.

questions.question: Which framework has popularized the 'utility-first' approach to CSS?
options: Bootstrap
Tailwind CSS
Sass
Bulma

questions.question: What is a major advantage of CSS Variables (Custom Properties) over preprocessor variables?
options: They are easier to write.
They can be updated dynamically at runtime via JavaScript.
They are only supported in mobile browsers.
They don't require any browser support.

questions.question: What do 'Container Queries' allow you to do?
options: Style elements based on the overall viewport size.
Style elements based on the parent component's size.
Only style elements inside a <div> tag.
Change the color of any 'container' class automatically.

questions.question: What is PostCSS used for?
options: Writing CSS inside JavaScript files.
Transforming CSS with JavaScript plugins (e.g., autoprefixing).
Generating documentation for your CSS.
Creating complex animations using only JavaScript.
